nasb.text: He who is guarantor for a stranger will surely suffer for it, But he who hates being a guarantor is secure.

esv.text: Whoever puts up security for a stranger will surely suffer harm, but he who hates striking hands in pledge is secure.

cnv.text: 為外人作保證人的，必受虧損； 厭惡替人擊掌擔保的，卻得著安穩。

ccb.text: 为他人作保，必受亏损； 厌恶当保人，得享平安。

csbs.text: 为别人作保的，必受损害； 恨恶击掌起誓的，安然无虑。
